category_sources: source_facts.description says it reads, creates, and modifies MP4 files; official site describes a C/C++ library for creating, modifying, and reading MP4 files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and repository README use MP4v2; source_facts.name is mp4v2.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section pointing to mp4v2.org/api for generated public API docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/enzo1982/mp4v2; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official site describes MP4v2 as a C/C++ library and source_facts.executables lists MP4 utility commands.
